notes:
Stories now read like stories.

Some chapters were arriving as one giant wall of text — which meant tapping a paragraph to jump there didn't work, the highlight covered the whole chapter, and if you stopped partway you had to listen to the whole thing again to find your place. Every source now gets proper paragraphs, so tap-to-listen, the highlight, your resume point and the progress bar all work the way they should.

Also in this update: the narration reliability fixes from 2.25.1, and Asura Scans in Browse.
